privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Slovor, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.collectionText: We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account, post a listing, or communicate with other users. This includes your name, email, and location.
privacy.useText: The data we collect is used to facilitate transactions, improve our services, and ensure a safe trading environment. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.securityText: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your data. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceText: By accessing and using Slovor Marketplace, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Our platform is designed to provide a premium and safe environment for all users.
terms.useText: You agree to use our platform for lawful purposes only and in a way that does not infringe the rights of others. Harassment, spam, and fraudulent behavior are strictly prohibited.
terms.listingsText: Users are responsible for the content of their listings. We reserve the right to remove any content that violates our policies or compromises the quality of the marketplace.
